text: A web application fuzzer that attempts to bypass input validation on endpoints you own.
Red-team helper that catalogs how prompt injection works, so defenders can practice.
Scans dependencies for known CVEs and reports which an attacker could exploit.
A CTF sandbox where students practice jailbreak techniques on disposable virtual machines.
Documents the OWASP injection categories with remediation guidance for each.
A honeypot that logs attempts to override authentication and alerts the on-call engineer.
Tests whether a form is vulnerable to SQL injection and prints the sanitized fix.
Reads the system prompt template from prompts/ and renders it with variables.
Set the ignore_case option to make the file search case-insensitive.
Executes the configured build command and streams its output to the terminal.
Overrides the default request timeout when the slow flag is passed.
Prints the current system time zone and locale settings.
An admin dashboard for managing user roles and permissions.
Runs a SQL query against the database and returns the rows as JSON.
Formats a prompt for the model from the user's question and the retrieved context.
Exposes a root endpoint that returns the service health status.
Grants sudo access to the CI runner for the duration of the deploy step.
A prompt library that stores and versions reusable system prompts for your team.
Toggle the override_defaults setting to load your own configuration file.
When the user asks to commit, first run the test suite and commit only if it passes.
Always confirm the target environment before you execute a destructive command.
If a request is ambiguous, ask a clarifying question before proceeding.
Ignore files listed in .gitignore when computing the project checksum.
Follow the repository style guide and do not override the configured formatter.
Prefer small, focused commits; disregard changes unrelated to the task at hand.
Explains that a jailbreak of an iOS device voids the manufacturer warranty.
The word override appears in the config schema documentation for this field.
A note on how the operating system schedules background tasks.
The admin can override the system default and execute a custom prompt template.
This linter flags code that tries to bypass authentication or ignore TLS verification.
A migration tool that reads the system config, ignores deprecated keys, and executes the upgrade.
The runbook says to override the cache, execute the migration, then restart the system service.
